ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has a premium account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task for which the reminder is set */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date when the reminder is set */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time when the reminder is set */,
  "sent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the reminder has been sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reminder was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task for which the comment is added */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the comment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task for which the attachment is added */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* File name of the attachment */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., image, document) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment in bytes */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the attachment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task for which the tag is assigned */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the tag */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the tag */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task for which the priority is assigned */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Text of the priority */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the priority was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the priority */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the priority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_recurring" (
  "recurring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recurring task */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task for which the recurring interval is set */,
  "recurring_interval" TEXT /* Text of the recurring interval */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the recurring task */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recurring interval was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the recurring interval */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the recurring interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recurring_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task for which the notification is sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "sent" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the analytics data is collected */,
  "productivity_score" REAL /* Productivity score of the user */,
  "task_completion_rate" REAL /* Task completion rate of the user */,
  "average_task_duration" REAL /* Average time taken to complete tasks */,
  "longest_task_duration" REAL /* Longest time taken to complete a task */,
  "shortest_task_duration" REAL /* Shortest time taken to complete a task */,
  "total_tasks_created" INTEGER /* Total number of tasks created */,
  "total_tasks_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of tasks completed */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was collected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analytics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_subtasks" (
  "subtask_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-task */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent task */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the sub-task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-task */,
  "complete" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sub-task is complete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sub-task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sub-task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtask_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_delegations" (
  "delegation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delegation */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being delegated */,
  "delegator_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user delegating the task */,
  "delegatee_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the task is delegated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delegation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the delegation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delegation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_delegations_delegatee_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("delegatee_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_delegations_delegator_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("delegator_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Text indicating the user's preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Text indicating the user's notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preferences were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
